'''Ganis''' was a rival of [[Nawnam]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When Ganis learned that Nawnam had tried to kill him and take over his empire, Ganis placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Nawnam's head.

{{Char-stub}}
